message:
chore(artifacts): add parity_gate.yaml for phase2c packets FP-P2D-415..433

Extend the committed phase2c parity gate corpus from 414 to 433.
Each packet directory carries a single `parity_gate.yaml` with the
standard two-tier budget:

```yaml
packet_id: FP-P2D-<id>
strict:
  critical_drift_budget: 0
  ...
hardened:
  ...
```

matching the byte-for-byte shape of every previously-committed
packet (cf. `FP-P2D-400/parity_gate.yaml` through
`FP-P2D-414/parity_gate.yaml` and the previous batched commit
"chore(artifacts): add parity_gate.yaml for phase2c packets
172-414"). Only `parity_gate.yaml` is committed per packet —
the `parity_report.*.json`, `parity_gate_result.json`, and
`parity_mismatch_corpus.json` files generated when a local
parity run executes against the packet are local-only outputs
and continue to be produced in-place without being checked in,
consistent with what the previously committed packet directories
look like (each existing committed packet dir holds only the yaml).

Nineteen new packet dirs (FP-P2D-415, FP-P2D-416, ...,
FP-P2D-433) are added. The packets extend the existing
numerically-increasing sequence; they were produced by the same
phase2c parity-gate fixture generator against recent conformance
expansion work and are a straight continuation of the existing
corpus.

This commit is artifact-only — no code, no test, no doc change
travels with it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+packet_id: FP-P2D-415
+strict:
+  critical_drift_budget: 0
+  non_critical_drift_budget_percent: 0.1
+hardened:
+  divergence_budget_percent: 1.0
+  allowlisted_divergence_categories: null
+machine_check:
+  suite: phase2c_packets
+  require_fixture_count_at_least: 1
+  require_failed: 0
